goal: Implement the New Bark Town starting area cluster
summary: 8 modules (data/maps/events/overworld/render/dialogue/sprites/mod), 35 tests, 3700 lines. PlayersHouse2F/1F, NewBarkTown, ElmsLab with full warps, NPCs, coord_events, scene system, starter selection, story flags. Gimli accuracy-reviewed against pokecrystal .asm files.

goal: Implement Route 29, Route 29/46 Gate, and Cherrygrove City
summary: Route 29 (60x18, wild encounters, ledges, catching tutorial), Route 29/46 Gate, Cherrygrove City (40x18, Guide Gent tour, rival ambush, PokéCenter/Mart templates, Mystic Water gift), 5 new species (Pidgey/Rattata/Sentret/Hoothoot/Hoppip), battle.rs module with Gen 2 damage formula, time-of-day encounter system, map connections. 1544 tests passing. Gimli accuracy-reviewed.
53 new tests across 10 verification groups (maps/events/mod/overworld/battle). 103 pokemonv2 tests, 1597 total engine tests. Zero bugs found — Sprint 1+2 code verified clean.

goal: Implement Route 30 and Mr. Pokemon's House
summary: Route 30 (20x54) with wild encounters, 3 trainers (Don/Mikey/Joey), Berry House, Mr. Pokemon's House first-visit cutscene (Mystery Egg + Oak Pokedex), trainer sight system, LoadTrainerParty scripting, beaten_flag persistence. 144 pokemonv2 tests passing.

goal: Implement Route 31, Route 31/Violet Gate, and Violet City exterior
summary: Route 31 (40x18) with Bug Catcher Wade, Kenya mail stub, Dark Cave entrance. Route 31/Violet Gate (10x8) bidirectional. Violet City exterior (40x36) with 9 building warps (7 stub interiors), Earl NPC, flypoint callback. 2 new species (Bellsprout/Gastly), 4 new moves, 14 event flags, 27 scripts. 171 pokemonv2 tests, 1665 total.
